github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat: Use Conventional Commits format for the subject line: <type>(optional scope): <summary>
Write an informative body after a blank line.
Body must include sections in this order: Problem, Solution, Testing.
Under Problem, explain what issue or goal prompted the change.
Under Solution, summarize key implementation choices and important files/modules touched.
Under Testing, list how the change was validated; if untested, explicitly say 'Not run' with reason.
Prefer concrete details over vague phrases; include behavior impact and edge cases when relevant.
Keep the subject concise (<= 72 chars) and wrap body lines near 72 chars.
